query:
SELECT c.name, c.title, c.company
FROM contacts c
JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
WHERE cp.projectId = '690089'
  AND c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready'
  AND c.crmOrphan = 0
  AND c.rejectedAt IS NULL
ORDER BY c.name
LIMIT 15;
